quizzes.title: IT Professional Elective Lec
quizzes.description: Reviewer for Module 1 (HTML Forms) and Module 2 (JS Basics, Functions, and Control Structures).

quizzes.title: IT Professional Elective — Midterm Reviewer
quizzes.description: Modules 1, 2 & 4 + Midterm coverage. Choose from Multiple Choice, Identification, or Midterm quiz versions.

quizzes.title: Module 4 and 5 Node.js
quizzes.description: Quiz on Node.js fundamentals, architecture, core modules, advantages, server implementation, and multi-file web servers.

quizzes.title: Module 6 MongoDB
quizzes.description: Quiz on MongoDB fundamentals, installation, commands, data types, Express.js, and EJS templating.

quizzes.title: Module 6 & 7 Internet Languages and Tools
quizzes.description: Quiz on Server-Side Scripting, Database Connectivity, CRUD, Sessions & Cookies, Dynamic Web Apps, and Web Security.
